review_text: What a lovely park.  Manager Dee does a fabulous job lovely green grass  beautifully clean amenities and fantastic location

We simply threw our money away by coming here. The service was terrible, the place was awful, the "kitchen" was disgusting, everything was very neglected, and the laundry service was "out of service." I'll definitely leave with a bad memory of Nowra. I'm giving it two stars because at least the bathrooms were clean, but everything was very old and neglected.

Very accommodating staff who was happy to book a second night last minute and fairly standard price, although a little high for the amenities provided. Unfortunately we did not find the kitchen and bathrooms to be the cleanest although shower pressure was really good.

Can be tricky getting into the park from the highway and is right next to the highway. But lovely place and lovely staff. I had to take one star off because the dryers weren’t working and I had a heap of washing to do.
Very convenient, thanks for giving us the drive thru site, easy stay
Location  is good  all sites are  powered  ,,I can't  see myself  jumping  up and  down   about  it    just  a bit better  than   a lot of  them

Had a booking from the 10th until the 13th of jan. We rang Kevin on the 8th to see if we could add a additonal two nights to which he was extremely  helpful and accommodating. Even let us take our pick of 4 sites he had left. The amenities are clean, Kevin keeps the park extremely tidy. The long term stayers there are friendly and kind. Would recommend this caravan park to any travellers coming through the area. Prices are reasonable too.  Thanks Kevin for your hospitality. Will recommend for sure

Unfortunately, we had a very negative experience at this campground!! On the day of our reservation, we contacted the owner Kevin to ask about a late check-in and were advised to call the office. We called several times, but no one answered and our calls were never returned.
Upon arrival later that evening, the owner told us to leave immediately because we arrived after office hours and he just did not want to “start the booking system.” He also stated that our reservation had already been canceled, which was incorrect - the cancellation notification was only sent after this conversation.
Overall, the owner’s behavior was disrespectful and unprofessional and showed a clear lack of proper guest handling!

By far the worst campground experience we had during our 3-month campervan trip through Australia.

Despite having a reservation made over five weeks in advance, we were explicitly told to leave the campground upon arrival. We had contacted the park by email and phone from around 4:00 pm onwards to ask about a late check-in, but received no clear information and could not reach anyone by phone.

Only when we arrived did we learn that late check-ins are not allowed. The operator then told us that our booking had been cancelled — without ever informing us beforehand — and made it clear that we had to leave, offering no help or alternatives. This happened late in the evening, in heavy rain.

To make matters worse, we received the official cancellation email only after we had already been sent away, proving that communication would have been possible.

Completely unprofessional, disrespectful, and absolutely not recommended.

Pros -  Manager was helpful and pleasant.. the amenities were clean, Caravan parking was easy with drive through parking, great price for peak period, river just behind was lovely.
Cons - the flies were horrendous(this was all of Nowra not just the park) the noise from the road was really loud.
We spent 4 days here then moved to the Showground for 4 days.

We stayed at Nowra Riverside Tourist Park for two nights and had a great experience. The park is well maintained, tidy, and the bathrooms and showers were clean.

We had a 7-metre caravan and found the site very roomy, which made it really comfortable for our stay. The park was easy to find, and everyone we came across was friendly and welcoming.

Would happily stay again and recommend it to others travelling through the area.
Clean amenities,  great location,  quiet considering its next to highway,  grassy sites
Lovely park and amenities. Spacious with lots of choice of camping spots. Very friendly and helpful chap who owns and runs the park! Would definitely recommend.
Operator very helpful. Facilities clean

Basic, but good.
A fair bit of traffic noise but bearable lol
Had a lovely night here! The reception man was very nice and helped me book a late check-in over the phone.
Handy park close to everything, clean amenities and tidy park 👌 😀
We really love this park.  Safe and friendly with excellent showers.  Kev is really easy to deal with and he keeps the place clean and tidy with Gary's help.
The sites were extremely clean and tidy, everyone in park were friendly, amenities are great, showers are hot ,Kevin is fantastic . Very well worth a stop

Lovely park. Definitely stay here again. Amenities were great and camp kitchen setup was terrific. Owner, Kev offered to dry our wet gear as the heavens opened up while we were out for the day. Thank you Kev, your a legend. Hopefully we will be back.
電源、水、シャワーありのテントサイト利用で30$です。オーナーさんがとても親切でした。10$負けてくれました。
Could do with some care factor - mowing grass would probably get rid of the midges!

If you accept Nowra Riverside Tourist Park For what it is, it is a great little spot. Yes it backs onto the Princess Highway but they also back onto the Shoalhaven River.
Though it packs onto the highway, it is still a great spot as the Levy is beside the highway. The noise is minimal.
Check-in was smooth and  I had no gripes about the facilities.
As stated, accept Nowra Riverside Park for what it is and have a great stay.

Got charged $100 a night. Unbelievable |Just stayed for the one overnight stay. |Online advertised for $50. |Nice grass sites|Toilet blocks the only amenities and outdated |Fair location, right bellow highway. |Will not be staying again after that price hike, would not reccomend.
Always a good stay here, but if you annoy old mate after 5pm lol an he's on the beers he will grumpy

Kevin has hospitality plus.
We rang to check that he had room. He was friendly and helpful.
Got there in good time. Park wasn’t busy so we were able to pick our own site. Plenty of room. Power and water handy.
The park is dated but Kevin does a great job keeping it clean and tidy, especially since he’s a one man band. He does hope travellers are considerate and arrive within office hours, but I’m sure he’d make adjustments for anyone who let him know they had been held up.

We booked a site on 5th of Oct. Booking number 4784950162050.
We arrived at 6 pm, the guy in the office said in rude words that we are late. The site that we were give was close to the highway, we asked him to give us another site, more close to the river. The camping was half-empty at 6-15 pm, but the guy literally said: I don't want to check if any sites are free, just take this one or leave. He was smoking to our faces, looked drunk and was rude and aggressive. This is absolutely inappropriate behaviour for anyone who works with people.

Nice quiet site close to the river and the road although you don't really notice any road noise.   The owner is friendly and welcoming.

Close enough to Nowra for eating out and coffee.

I would recommend this park for a few nights.
Great little park, basic facilities, really supportive manager (Kevin). Good location and quiet at night!
Great spot…! Amenities very clean…! The Manager Kevin is great and very very helpful…! We will be back…!❤️✅👍🐶

A lovely little park nestled next to the river and only a short walk to the CBD.
Kevin is a very helpful and pleasant bloke to deal with.
Well positioned near the river and close to town. Basic facilities, but meets expectations - clean, accessible, well-kept. Very well priced.
We had our caravan. Really good big sites, nice small park with older but clean amenities. The motorway was up overhead from the park but you couldn't really hear the traffic. Enjoyed our stay
Very friendly place to stay. Well kept,clean amenities. Lovely grassy areas,well maintained
Excellent place and very friendly

We stayed for 3 nights in our van very quiet and peaceful, the staff where so pleasant and helpful. the shower in the ensuite had the best pressure
We will definitely be back again
Comfortable beds and the host was very understanding when it became evident that I had made a mistake in my booking and did what she could to accommodate us. Couldn’t be happier!

We have stayed before & this time was just for one night in our motor home on a powered site for a tennis tournament. Lovely people running it while Kev was away. The lady was so helpful. Perfect location, lot's of space & very tidy.
Great location and amenities, best of my journey from Mel to Sydney.

Love this quiet place, so sanctuary , not many people which is good. Quiet place.
Does not have bbq facilities though. Good carpark,
Good area for families but no bbq grill, not much grass areas. But great lil walk and nice for fishing
Was nice to deal with u thanks mate

Amenities are dated but clean & in good working order👍convenient for us because we needed our car serviced while away. The riverside location is very pretty atm with the jacaranda  🌳 's in flower ,nice walk 🚶‍♀️ along the shoalhaven river. Noisy because of the bridge works & the traffic, but not too bad overnight during our stay

This was a very good Caravan Park and has a lot of ticks and a couple of crosses|Most of the facilities were very good as was the site except it was not very sheltered but ok|Great right next to the river, but long walks to town and for me that is good😊😊|All in all a very good middle of the range CP!!
Manager Kev was such a help when we encountered some mechanical trouble. Went above and beyond to help us get back on the road, and was great to have a chat to as well.
Great spot right on the river, with everything you need. Kevin was so great in helping us out when we had van issues coming into the town, could not recommend more highly 👌

Depending on what your looking for, big and flashy not, but location is lovely, ammenitys are keep clean and tidy as are the grounds, pick a site, we are over looking the river lovely.  Rates are great as is the manager...

best spot on the river great host,will return .good rates,friendly and helpfull staff ,ammenities were spotless and grounds were immaculate,close town and cafes,met some great people and kids really enjoyed the guinea pigs
